calendar.matters:
MASTER CALENDAR JURY
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Vacated

OTHER SETTLEMENT CONFERENCE
Off Calendar Apr-08-2009 Off Calendar
MINI MINUTES: Appearances:
Miguel Duarte, property manager, on telephone standby on behalf of plaintiff U.S. Bank National Association.
Robert Ressner representing the plaintiff.

Defendant Francisco Martinez is present.
Jeremy Reyes representing the defendant through limited scope.

This matter comes on calendar for an Unlawful Detainer Settlement Conference. The Judge Pro Tem, litigants and counsel confer privately for settlement discussions.

The case settled, the trial date of 4/13/09 is vacated.

Judge Pro Tem Irving Pfeffer, Clerk Maria Olopernes-Pena, Not Reported. (218)

DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT
Off Calendar Feb-04-2009 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: DEFENDANT FRANCISCO MARTINEZ DEMURRER TO COMPLAINT. No appearances on this matter. The Court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: SUSTAINED WITH 10 DAYS LEAVE TO AMEND. NO OPPOSITION FILED. (Order after hearing signed at the Ex Parte hearing today)(302/CWW) Judge: Charlotte Walter Woolard, Reporter: Kent Gubbine, CSR 5797
